textByHash.1cb5dd3e036f567a5d08ea13b5e540083e68758d: Oh thank Saradomin! I thought I'd be left out here forever.
textByHash.09e63ebd9ee2bd3e74b8b34e8703e89bf824e3b4: I knew the row boat wasn't sea worthy. I couldn't risk bringing him along but you must get him off that platform.
textByHash.6632a7074ec69fbf02b97e05248e96d1ad16362b: Five days ago we pulled in a huge catch. As well as fish we caught small slug like creatures, hundreds of them.
textByHash.c5a55f502bb7d3658b306b65ba0bb45da77e3443: That's when the fishermen began to act strange.
textByHash.0dc7e0d2fffb011f2a4c326cf688502625506361: It was the sea slugs, they attach themselves to your body and somehow take over the mind of the carrier.
textByHash.0371bf0af6bbfd163a0d8ababaff803342418724: I told Kennith to hide until I returned but I was washed up here.
textByHash.87c94e179915696a53a673bf5ca0635897fa858e: Please go back and get my boy, you can send help for me later.
textByHash.5ae97e20dee02655a230fb79fa7535a1c7975f89: A few more minutes and that thing would have full control of your body.
textByHash.e769f8afc0f31d2122b518c1fb3eb7b7b5e29d1e: Oh my, I must get back to shore.
textByHash.77819154c5074d9bba95b74b301a04f344e5056d: I never did get the chance to thank you properly for saving Kennith and myself.
textByHash.bc48d08c8069c3096fe4d50fffda6ece412cb93e: Play it down if you will. It was a truly brave thing you did.
